positive: A maximalist, abstract jungle scene composition with geometric patterns and vibrant flora. The central focus is a stylized, elegant silhouette of a tropical animal (like a jaguar or toucan) incorporated seamlessly into the leaf structure. Use a color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and jungle teal. The artwork should mimic a highly detailed, contemporary woodcut or tattoo flash style, with clean lines and strong contrasts against a clean background. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, designed to curve around a circular patch or rectangular apparel print area. Overhead, bright, diffuse lighting, high resolution, hyper-detailed, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, low contrast, watermark, signature, text, messy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, cartoon, photorealistic, logo, writing, grainy, grayscale
